title: 日本ダービーの後に・勝者とは、

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Aaaaah!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I won! I WOOOOON!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: I did it! Me! I'm a Derby champiooon!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text:
Winning Ticket conquers the Japanese Derby, the
race she's been dreaming of winning since the
beginning!

text_block_list.name: Caster
text_block_list.text: And it was the race of a lifetime!

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text:
Yeeeaaah! Tic-ke-zo! Tic-ke-zo! Tic-ke-zo!
Tic-ke-zo!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Waaaaah! My fans!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
Thanks for cheering me on! Thank you! I... I DID
IIIT!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Huff... huff... Damn... I lost!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(How did she do that? I couldn't catch up no
matter how hard I tried!)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Is that how strong she really is?)

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text: Thank youuu! And I'm just getting started!

text_block_list.name: Winning Ticket
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to show you all what dreams are made
of, so keep watching me!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Dreams...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
(She's so genuine about everything, from the way
she gets excited to the way she celebrates.)

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: (Her presence is overwhelming...)

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text:
Ticket... It seems I misjudged that explosive
power of yours.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: However, this is the last time I let you win.

text_block_list.name: Biwa Hayahide
text_block_list.text: I must recalculate my strategy right away!

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hey...

Sure, she didn't win, but she still made it on the
scoreboard. That's an achievement in and of
itself.
Besides...

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Hmph. I know.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text:
I refuse to let anyone say things are over for me
just 'cause I lost here.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: Not when I still have the Kikuka Sho to win!

The finale of the Triple Crown tour, the Kikuka
Sho, awaits us next.

She reaffirms her dedication to keep pushing on
so she can seize the next crown.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: I have to win.

text_block_list.name: Narita Taishin
text_block_list.text: As long as I win, then one day...
